roa.docketEntryComment: Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND PENDING SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISSUED 06-01-22/INTC/X: DA MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING IS GRANTED,/CAUSE/CTORD: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISSUED 06-01-22 IS RECALLED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE ON OR, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: COMPLY WITH ANY PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDERS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 2 HOURS/LDPX: 08-01-22 (60)/

/CAL: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA & COUNSEL/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 06-14-22(10TH)/X: THE 60TH DAY IS 08-01-22,/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALLINSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4: 400 BLOCK OF EDDY ST, SF/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 2 HRS/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/X: PER DEPUTY, THE DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC HEALTH REPORTSTHAT THE DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO MAKE AN APPEARANCE,/CAUSE/BAIL:15,000/CONTD:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA & COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
